zh.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric是Ailric Fitz Aschenald的兒子，於大約1080年出生在英國。他和Mathilda至少有5個兒子。他去世於1130年在英國越可爾希爾可斯同享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric是Ailric Fitz Aschenald的儿子，于大约1080年出生在英国。他和Mathilda至少有5个儿子。他去世于1130年在英国越可爾希爾可斯同享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sweyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McSween  .

variants.name: McSween
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Suibhne, ‘son of Suibhne’, a Gaelic name meaning ‘pleasant, affable’, see McQueen 1 and Irish McSweeney .

Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Suain based on Old Norse sveinn ‘boy, servant’, which was also used as a personal name. This is given as the origin of the McQueen family of Skye (see also McSwain and Whan ) although the two similar personal names Suibhne and Sveinn, Gaelic and Scandinavian, have influenced each other more widely in Scotland.

variants.name: Sweeden
meanings: Dutch (Van Sweeden): variant of Van Zweeden, a habitational name for someone from Sweden.
Probably also an altered form of Norwegian   Sween   or possibly Irish   Sweeten  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric was born about 1080, in England as the son of Ailric Fitz Aschenald. He had at least 5 sons with Mathilda. He died in 1130, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric est né environ 1080, à Angleterre, fils de Ailric Fitz Aschenald. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Mathilda. Il est décédé en 1130, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric wurde um 1080 in England, als Sohn von Ailric Fitz Aschenald geboren. Er hatte mit Mathilda mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1130 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric è nato il circa 1080 nel England come figlio di Ailric Fitz Aschenald. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Mathilda. Morì nel 1130, nel Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaricは約1080年にイギリスでAilric Fitz Aschenaldの息子として生まれた。彼はMathildaとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1130年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric(은)는 대략 1080년 영국에서 Ailric Fitz Aschenald의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mathilda(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Inglaterra filho de Ailric Fitz Aschenald. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Mathilda. Ele faleceu em 1130, em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric родился около 1080 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Ailric Fitz Aschenald. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Mathilda. Он умер в 1130 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

sm.from 1120 to 1130: mai le 1120 e o'o I le 1130

es.lifeSummary: Sweyn FitzAlaric nació aproximadamente 1080, en Inglaterra como hijo de Ailric Fitz Aschenald. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Mathilda. Murió en 1130, en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
